claim: E_QA(b, e, next_state) = 0 if T(b,e) == next_state else 1 is a structurally well-formed energy function on QA state spaces satisfying all five EBM axioms (non-negativity, data-manifold zero, monotonicity in mismatch, valid Boltzmann distribution, discrete score identity) with integer state throughout (S2, A1 compliant).

axioms_verified.non_negativity: E in {0, 1}, exhaustively verified on S_9^2 x {1..9}
axioms_verified.monotonicity: E_window grows monotonically with injected T-mismatch fraction
axioms_verified.boltzmann_distribution: well-formed occupancy distribution; T_boltzmann = 2π/m per cert [215]
axioms_verified.score_identity: argmax of Boltzmann over next_state equals T-operator step (exhaustive S_9)

structural_corollaries: qa_detect is a trained EBM: fit() learns low-energy manifold, score_anomaly() evaluates E_window
MCMC-free sampling: T-operator walk IS Gibbs sampling from QA Boltzmann
No approximation error in the score function (discrete-exact)
Theorem NT compliance: energy read-out is the only observer-layer crossing

cross_references.qa_cert_154: T-operator coherence — empirical QCI validation on finance pipeline (partial r=-0.22, 84% robust)
cross_references.qa_cert_191: Bateson Learning Levels — invariant filtration provides the EBM manifold stratification
cross_references.qa_cert_215: Resonance-Bin Correspondence — gives the temperature identity T_boltzmann = 2π/m
cross_references.theorem_NT: Observer Projection Firewall — energy is integer-valued pointwise; continuous only at read-out

external_references.lecun_2006: LeCun, Chopra, Hadsell, Ranzato, Huang (2006) — A Tutorial on Energy-Based Learning
external_references.hinton_2002: Hinton (2002) — Training Products of Experts by Minimizing Contrastive Divergence

source.motivation: Recognize that qa_detect, qa_mapping QCI pipeline, and broader QA coherence toolkit are already a discrete-native EBM. Making the claim formal and certified connects QA to the established EBM research tradition without changing the underlying algebra.
